calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Default Judgment Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-21-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Bret A. Yaple, Esq. appeared for plaintiff San Francisco Federal Credit Union.
William Cooper, Collections Manager for plaintiff San Francisco Federal Credit Union, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by the defaulted defendant Karina Patton.
Default was entered against the defendant on March 17, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on March 17, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff San Francisco Federal Credit Union, and against the Defaulted Defendant Karina Patton, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $25,839.20.
Pre-Judgment Interest - $3,825.36.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $580.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $33,069.56.

Proposed judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
